title: Stacks & Skills

HTML5 & CSS3 (Modern Responsive Layouts, Flexbox, Grid)

title: Education & Academic Journey
description: Details of my academic background and milestones, where I balanced school curriculum with deep-dives into computer science and technical innovations.

DPSV: Completed Grade XII (CBSE). Focused on Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, and Computer Science.
Actively built side projects and automated classroom schedules, bridging the gap between theory and practical software engineering.
SPAD: Completed Grade X (ICSE) with exceptional performance.
Represented the school at multiple regional science fairs, tech symposiums, and exuberances.
Led computer application workshops for junior students, teaching them frontend fundamentals.

title: Awards & Achievements
description: Recognitions, contest wins, and major milestones achieved throughout my engineering and academic path.

Global Hackathon Winner - WhiteHat Jr (A: Competed against thousands of participants worldwide to secure a top position by designing and presenting an innovative educational app.
This early milestone solidified my passion for coding, launching a journey into full-stack development and game engineering.
Academic & Science Event Awards: First Place in Regional STEM Exhibition for an automated weather station prototype.
Outstanding Contribution Award at St. Patrick's Academy for technical coordination of school festivals.
Top performer in national cyber olympiads throughout middle and high school.

title: Work Experiences
description: My professional experience spans leading open-source project architectures, working on premium design systems, and building AI-enabled software products.

data.label: Basalt3 — Lead Architect
data.description: Leading the architectural design of open-source tools tailored for agentic infrastructure, designing minimal developer workflows and integrations to enable flawless automation in development environments.

data.label: Once UI — Design System Collaborator
data.description: Collaborating on the design system structure and building high-performance UI libraries, integrating user feedback loop to refine UI primitives and layout structures.

data.label: Next Bench — AI Solution Developer
data.description: Building state-of-the-art AI-enabled solutions designed to enhance learning experiences and workloads for students.

data.label: WhiteHat Jr — Early Training & App Development
